title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
